meaning: n.鍑濆浐姹芥补,鍑濆浐姹芥补寮箆t.鐢ㄥ嚌鍥烘苯娌圭偢
examples: If there's a fire or explosion, you don't want your clothes turning into a napalm-like substance on your skin.
This is Kim, a nine-year-old Vietnam girl, her back ruined by napalm, and she awakened the conscience of the nation of America to begin to end the Vietnam War.
"There's stuff I can't tell you, but it was pretty crazy, " says actor Robert Duvall who played napalm-loving Lt.
